name: Lentil, Garbanzo Bean and Tomato Salad
recipeIngredient: 15-16 oz Can of Garbanzo beans (rinsed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, lentils, diced carrots, and bay leaf in a heavy medium saucepan.
2. Bring to boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until lentils are just tender, about 25 minutes.
4. Drain; transfer to a large bowl.
5. Cool mixture.
6. Mix all remaining ingredients into the cooled lentils.
7. Season to taste with salt and pepper. (This dish can be prepared up to 4 hours in advance. Cover and refrigerate.)
